## Problem / Motivation

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the motivation behind it.

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## User Story

<!-- Optional but helpful. Format: "As a <role>, I want <goal> so that <benefit>." -->

As a **[student / parent / tutor / admin]**, I want **[feature]** so that **[benefit]**.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Affected Area

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Mobile (React Native / Expo)
- [ ] Backend / API (NestJS)
- [ ] Admin Panel (React + Vite)
- [ ] Landing Page (Next.js)
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps
- [ ] Design / UX

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Feature implemented and working in development
- [ ] Unit / integration tests added
- [ ] UI matches design specs (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation / changelog updated
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] QA tested on target platform(s)
